authentication.access_token_ttl_sec.label: Access token TTL
authentication.access_token_ttl_sec.description: Duration in seconds before an access token expires

authentication.refresh_token_short_ttl_s.label: Refresh token (short)
authentication.refresh_token_short_ttl_s.description: Duration in seconds for short-lived refresh tokens (no remember me)

authentication.refresh_token_long_ttl_se.label: Refresh token (long)
authentication.refresh_token_long_ttl_se.description: Duration in seconds for long-lived refresh tokens (remember me)

authentication.magic_link_token_ttl_sec.label: Magic link TTL
authentication.magic_link_token_ttl_sec.description: Duration in seconds before a magic link expires

authentication.magic_link_refresh_token_.label: Magic link refresh TTL
authentication.magic_link_refresh_token_.description: Duration in seconds for the refresh token issued via magic link

password.min_length.label: Minimum length
password.min_length.description: Minimum number of characters required in a password

password.require_digit.label: Require digit
password.require_digit.description: Password must contain at least one digit

password.require_special_char.label: Require special character
password.require_special_char.description: Password must contain at least one special character

password.require_lowercase.label: Require lowercase
password.require_lowercase.description: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter

password.require_uppercase.label: Require uppercase
password.require_uppercase.description: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter

password.forbid_keyboard_sequence.label: Forbid keyboard sequences
password.forbid_keyboard_sequence.description: Reject passwords containing keyboard patterns (qwerty, azerty)

password.forbid_user_info.label: Forbid user info
password.forbid_user_info.description: Reject passwords containing the user's email or name

password.forbid_common_password.label: Forbid common passwords
password.forbid_common_password.description: Reject commonly used or breached passwords

password.forgot_token_ttl_sec.label: Forgot password TTL
password.forgot_token_ttl_sec.description: Duration in seconds before a password reset token expires

account.email_verification_token_ttl_sec.label: Email verification TTL
account.email_verification_token_ttl_sec.description: Duration in seconds before an email verification token expires

account.deletion_token_ttl_sec.label: Account deletion TTL
account.deletion_token_ttl_sec.description: Duration in seconds before an account deletion token expires

mfa.verify_token_ttl_sec.label: MFA verify TTL
mfa.verify_token_ttl_sec.description: Duration in seconds to complete MFA setup verification

mfa.validate_token_ttl_sec.label: MFA validate TTL
mfa.validate_token_ttl_sec.description: Duration in seconds to validate a MFA code during sign-in

mfa.disabling_token_ttl_sec.label: MFA disabling TTL
mfa.disabling_token_ttl_sec.description: Duration in seconds to confirm MFA disabling

security.hash_memory_cost.label: Hash memory cost
security.hash_memory_cost.description: Memory in KiB used by the Argon2 hashing algorithm

security.hash_time_cost.label: Hash time cost
security.hash_time_cost.description: Number of iterations for Argon2 hashing

security.hash_parallelism.label: Hash parallelism
security.hash_parallelism.description: Number of parallel threads for Argon2 hashing

security.throttle_ttl_sec.label: Throttle window
security.throttle_ttl_sec.description: Time window in seconds for rate limiting

security.throttle_origin_limit.label: Origin limit
security.throttle_origin_limit.description: Maximum requests per origin within the throttle window

security.throttle_identity_limit.label: Identity limit
security.throttle_identity_limit.description: Maximum requests per identity (email) within the throttle window

security.throttle_combined_limit.label: Combined limit
security.throttle_combined_limit.description: Maximum requests per origin+identity combination within the throttle window

security.endpoint_delay_min_ms.label: Minimum endpoint delay
security.endpoint_delay_min_ms.description: Minimum artificial delay in milliseconds added to responses

security.endpoint_delay_max_ms.label: Maximum endpoint delay
security.endpoint_delay_max_ms.description: Maximum artificial delay in milliseconds added to responses

passwordRules.noCommonPassword: Must not be a common password
